text: BLOCKADE DAY 1 RESULTS: 6 ships U-turned. Zero vessels reached Iranian ports. 3 vessels (incl. Chinese-owned Rich Starry + 2 sanctioned tankers) transited strait but NOT to Iran. 157.7M barrels Iranian oil floating on water — 97.6% destined for China. Beijing: 'The Strait is open to us.' Saudi + 5 Gulf states jointly demand US end blockade. Houthi al-Bukhaiti threatens own Bab al-Mandeb blockade.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, NBC News, Al Jazeera, CNBC confirmed blockade Day 1 results and China defiance.

text: HEZBOLLAH NEW CAPABILITY: First use of jam-proof optical-guidance drone. 40+ drones hit 20+ targets across northern Israel — Karmiel paratrooper base, Golani Division HQ at Shraga, Tefen base, Kiryat Shmona, Nahariya. Only small number intercepted. 'Heavy damage.' If Israeli EW can't defeat these, it neutralizes a key advantage. Mass deployment shows sustained production despite months of strikes.
verificationNote: PressTV, Middle East Monitor, Israel National News confirmed drone deployment and target list.

text: RUSSIA EVACUATES BUSHEHR: 108 of 128 staff pulled from Iran's nuclear plant. Rosatom: attack could cause 'Chernobyl-level disaster.' Only 20 remain. This signals Moscow believes a strike is plausible. Meanwhile Mossad Director Barnea: 'Our mission not complete until this radical regime is replaced.' First public regime-change call from Israeli intelligence chief. The endgame is expanding.
verificationNote: Kurdistan24, Moscow Times confirmed Bushehr. Times of Israel, APA confirmed Barnea statement.

text: OIL PLUNGING: Brent $94.87 (-4.4%), WTI $91.42 (-7.7%) — sharpest single-day drop since ceasefire. Pakistan pushing Islamabad Round 2 as early as Thursday. IEA BOMBSHELL: demand forecast slashed to -80K bpd (was +640K). March: 10.1M bpd lost = LARGEST supply disruption in HISTORY. IMF cuts global growth to 3.1%. Two major institutional reports in one day paint catastrophic economic picture.
verificationNote: CNBC, Trading Economics confirmed oil prices. Al Jazeera confirmed IEA. PBS, Bloomberg confirmed IMF.

text: ITALY BREAKS RANKS: PM Meloni suspends two-decade defense pact with Israel. FM Tajani: 'unacceptable attacks' on civilians. Israel summons ambassador. Third bilateral protest. Kallas: 'gravest violation of international law since WWII.' EU sanctions 19 Iranian officials. Lavrov arrives Beijing to coordinate with Wang Yi. Europe fragmenting — between opposing Israel AND sanctioning Iran simultaneously.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Haaretz confirmed Italy. EEAS confirmed Kallas. RFE/RL confirmed Lavrov-Beijing.

text: Day 46 PM roundup: Oil plunges Brent $94.87 WTI $91.42 on talk hopes. BLOCKADE DAY 1: 6 ships U-turned. Italy suspends defense pact. Hezbollah jam-proof drone hits 20+ targets. IDF 'Op Silver Plough' buffer zone. Russia evacuates Bushehr. Barnea: 'regime change.' Iran UN letter: 'gross violation.' IEA: 10.1M bpd lost. IMF: 3.1% growth. Kallas: 'gravest since WWII.' text: SANCTIONS ESCALATION: Bloomberg reports US Treasury will NOT renew 30-day Iran oil waiver when it expires April 19. ~140M barrels stranded Iranian oil authorization ends. Russia oil waiver also expired April 11. India faces double hit — lost 3M bpd from Hormuz + 1.5M bpd Russian crude now restricted. This is 'full force Economic Fury.' China gets 97.6% of Iran's oil exports — Beijing is the real target here.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Reuters via Investing.com, CNBC confirmed waiver expiry and India double hit.

text: HISTORIC: First Israel-Lebanon direct talks since 1993 at Rubio's State Dept. Both sides agree to further negotiations. BUT Hezbollah's Qassem torpedoes: 'futile, surrender.' Wafiq Safa: 'will not abide by any agreements.' Israeli Amb. Leiter: 'Don't want French near this.' Haaretz: Netanyahu using talks to buy time for Bint Jbeil. Diplomacy vs. Hezbollah veto power — the core Lebanon dilemma.
verificationNote: NPR, State Department, Axios, Haaretz, Democracy Now confirmed talks and rejections.

text: MARKETS: S&P 500 closes at 6,967 (+1.18%) — erases ALL Iran war losses. Nasdaq +1.96% to 23,639. Rally driven by Iran talk optimism despite bad PPI. Oil settles Brent $94.79, WTI $91.28 — afternoon session extends decline. 10Y yield 4.248%. Markets betting on diplomatic resolution before April 21 ceasefire expiry. But sanctions waiver expiring + blockade Day 2 = mixed signals.
verificationNote: CNBC, Motley Fool, Yahoo Finance confirmed market data. TheStreet confirmed close.

text: Haaretz INVESTIGATION: 1 in 4 Iranian missiles penetrated Israel's air defenses in the last week of the 40-day war. Cluster missiles caused significant damage. Intercept rates degraded sharply from early war performance. This contradicts the 'impenetrable Iron Dome' narrative. Also: IRGC Navy warns any military vessel approaching Hormuz = ceasefire violation. Rhetoric escalating.
verificationNote: Haaretz investigation confirmed. Islam Times confirmed IRGC warning.

text: Xi Jinping's FIRST personal statement since war began: 'world must not revert to law of the jungle.' 4 proposals for Middle East peace to Abu Dhabi Crown Prince. Also told Spain's Sanchez 'international order crumbling.' FM Guo: blockade 'dangerous and irresponsible.' Lavrov arrives Beijing for coordination with Wang Yi. China positioning as alternative mediator to Pakistan/US. This is a geopolitical realignment in real time.
verificationNote: CNBC, Foreign Policy, NBC News, RFE/RL confirmed Xi statement and Lavrov visit.

text: Day 47 PM roundup: Oil settles Brent $94.79 WTI $91.28. Israel-Lebanon DC talks agree to further negotiations (first since 1993). Trump hints Round 2 'in next two days.' US sanctions waiver expires April 19. Xi Jinping first personal statement. S&P 500 +1.18% erases ALL war losses. First ICRC aid to Iran. CENTCOM blockade holds. 17-nation coalition backs talks. text: CENTCOM BLOCKADE DAY 3: Admiral Brad Cooper confirms blockade 'fully implemented — all maritime trade halted within 36 hours.' 10,000+ US personnel, dozen warships, 100+ aircraft. 4 Iran-linked ships attempted passage April 14. IRGC Navy repeats warning: any military vessel approaching = ceasefire violation. France-UK announce April 17 summit for 'purely defensive' multinational Hormuz mission with 40+ nations invited.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Navy Times, NBC News confirmed CENTCOM blockade status. Bloomberg confirmed France-UK summit.

text: BINT JBEIL overnight: Sgt. Maj. Bianco KIA (Humvee overturn). 10 paratroopers from 101st Battalion wounded in firefight with 3-man Hezbollah cell (3 serious). Lt. Col. battalion commander SERIOUSLY wounded in separate incident. 3 Hezbollah fighters killed. IDF claims 100+ Hezbollah killed in area over past week. Meanwhile Hezbollah fires 30+ rockets at Galilee — 1 wounded in Tamra. Israel responds with drone strikes south of Beirut killing 2.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Antiwar.com, JNS, Jerusalem Post confirmed Bint Jbeil casualties and Hezbollah rockets.

text: OIL MIXED signals: Brent JUMPS to $96.80 (+2.13%) on blockade supply fears. WTI dips to $90.92 (-0.40%) on talk optimism. Divergence shows market uncertainty. Iran claims $270B in war losses — demands compensation from US, Israel, AND 5 Arab states. Harvard's Linda Bilmes: 'I am certain we will reach $1 trillion for the Iran war.' SPR 2nd tranche: 8.48M bbl to Gunvor, Phillips 66, Trafigura, Macquarie.
